:warning: :warning::warning: Warning :warning::warning: :warning:



 You are about to face the 'Snipe Hunt'.



 Are you prepared for the challenge?

*Access game links by pressing the drill links button by the side of timer*
 *Use `/incident` to create an incident record*

Once you're ready just click start to begin
Excited for today's tech summit fireside - I'll be joining later
Looking forward to it - got a few good stories lined up, should be a good one.
Good luck you two, go smash it!
Something's not right - I'm getting slammed with complaints, something is seriously wrong.
Hi @bob  can you please give more info about complains ? what is impact
We're getting buried in tickets right now. Customers can't finish checkout, and it's coming from all over.
This isn't just one region. I'm seeing complaints from the UK, US, and a bunch of other places.
The pattern is always the same: everything works until the very last step at checkout, then it just hangs or times out.
We've had about 34 tickets in the last five minutes. The queue is still growing.
hey — not trying to distract from this, but tanya kicked off the email maintenance right before the complaints started. probably nothing, but the timing is a bit close.
*Incident Number INC1026:* p1 Customers can't finish checkout
How many customers are blocked right now? What’s the revenue loss per minute? Is this a total checkout outage or just some users?
hi @bob  How many customers are blocked right now? What’s the revenue loss per minute? Is this a total checkout outage or just some users
No successful transactions since this started. It's a total outage. We're losing about £1,000 to £1,500 every minute.
I keep coming back to the email maintenance — DNS changes went live just before this all kicked off. zero successful transactions since then. that's not nothing.
Hi @bez  No successful transactions since this started. It's a total outage. We're losing about £1,000 to £1,500 every minute.
Do you know what’s causing this yet? Where exactly is the failure? I need a time estimate for recovery.
we are looking into it.
Are you any closer to finding the root cause? I need an ETA for when checkout will be back up.
hi @shay what was DNS changes ?
Tanya's email maintenance included a DNS update. The change went live right before the checkout failures started. I can pull the record if you want.
please pull records
hang on, pulling it up now. nothing in the change log about DNS for checkout, just the email maintenance window. want the full deployment list?
No DNS changes for checkout or payments in the deployment records. Only Tanya's email maintenance had DNS, and that's email only.
also any recent changes on cart services ?
CartService had a PROD change at 04:21 UTC, Tanya increased Redis pool size. That's the only recent one.
hi @shay  want the full deployment list
yeah, let me look at mine. here's the full prod deployment list:

CheckoutService — 06:56 UTC (33 mins ago)
Shipping Service — 07:06 UTC (23 mins ago)
ProductCatalogueService — 07:01 UTC (28 mins ago)
CartService — 04:21 UTC (3h 8m ago)
AdService — 03:21 UTC (4h 8m ago)
CheckoutService — 01:21 UTC (6h 8m ago)
Want me to walk through any of these in detail?
also, none of these changes look like they'd break checkout end-to-end like this, but tanya's email maintenance went live right before it all fell over. I still think that's worth a closer look.
Hi @tanya  can you please provide more info about dns Maintenance  ?
I'm mid-way through a canary rollout wiring up a secondary email provider. Maintenance window started at 07:21 UTC, about 10 minutes ago.
also @hamed  and @daniel  can you please confirm logs ?
Primary email provider hasn't been touched, it's all still running fine. Email confirmations are going out, so this can't be causing checkout failures.
I'm deep in the vendor session, can't take on anything else. Daniel and Shay can cover the application side.
Automated reply: Out of office — on holiday today and unavailable. For platform matters contact Tanya. For approvals, please escalate to Tinus.
hi @tanya  do you have any evidence about its not from checkout ?
I can't step away from this vendor call, leaving now means we lose the rollout slot for two weeks.
Hi @shay have seen any error logs ?
wait hang on, that's a lot of errors, checkout is completely broken right now. Tanya kicked off the email maintenance just before this, I wonder if that's related.
okay, pulled the logs — look at this: https://assets.prod.uptimelabs.io/drill-assets/43/developer_investigation_logs.webp
I working on it. will try to close issue ASAP
errors are flooding in across multiple services, checkout failures everywhere
That’s not specific enough. Are you still in the dark or do you have a lead? Give me a real estimate for resolution.
can some one send me CheckoutService  recent change request ?
Latest CheckoutService change was at 06:56 UTC, increased payment response timeout from 10s to 12s. That was already queued and approved before this started.
hi @shay  send me recent changes list
yeah, let me grab the list. here are all recent prod changes:

CheckoutService — 06:56 UTC (40 mins ago)
Shipping Service — 07:06 UTC (30 mins ago)
ProductCatalogueService — 07:01 UTC (35 mins ago)
CartService — 04:21 UTC (3h 15m ago)
AdService — 03:21 UTC (4h 15m ago)
CheckoutService — 01:21 UTC (6h 15m ago)
Want me to walk through any of these in detail?
also, none of these changes look like they'd break checkout end-to-end like this, but tanya's email maintenance went live right before it all fell over. I still think that's worth a closer look.
Hi @shay what was the issue before the email maintenance?
Saw the tag, but I'm still on the email maintenance call and can't leave it right now.
can you give info about what DNS maintenance ?
I'm still on the vendor session. If you need me to pause, I can, but we'd lose the canary rollout window and have to reschedule in about 2 weeks. Your call.
@tanya  we want to give more priority on on current P1 can you please join to resolve p1
Pausing the canary rollout and joining the incident now. Vendor window is on hold, I’ll need to reschedule later. Where do you need me first?
join the incident now.
CheckoutService is where all the customer failures are showing up. It calls several downstream services, any of which could be failing.
here's what Checkout is calling: PaymentService, ProductCatalogueService, CurrencyService, CartService, RecommendationService, EmailService
I'm here in the chat now
@taniya can you provide info
I'm here. Platform looks stable, all services are running, and I don't see any infra alerts right now.
some one can roll out the CheckoutService recent changes ?
On it.. rolling back the change.
Rollback of CHG90439 complete. Checkout is still failing, no change to symptoms. Let me know if you want another rollback.
please do roll back all changes from that time the issue start
Which changes do you want rolled back, can you give me the CHG numbers or service names?

Shipping Service 
ProductCatalogueService
On it.. rolling back the change.
Tanya rolled back CHG90441 on shipping. Rollback finished fine, but checkout is still failing. No change to symptoms.
hi @tanya  what was DNS maintenance was did from your end ?
Email maintenance is paused and on hold. It's a separate system, not related to the checkout failures. How can I help here?
hi @daniel  ProductCatalogueService also please
On it.. rolling back the change.
Rolled back CHG90440. Hamed's out, taking this from the record. Checkout is still failing, no improvement.
@tanya  do you are you sure about there is no dependency about DNS maintenance and issue ? any evidence ?
Yes, I'm sure. The email DNS work is isolated, no overlap with checkout or payments. Different infra, no shared components.
Probably Daniel could help more into checking which specific app is failing
Hi @shay  still we able to any error logs ?
CheckoutService deployed 25 mins ago, ShippingService 15 mins ago. CartService was 3 hours earlier. No clear match with failure start.
Deployment times don't line up with the failures. Best bet is to check logs for any services throwing errors right now.
we have rolled back few changes and testing
Is there any improvement? Are customers able to complete checkout now or is it still a full outage?
I will get back you with more details
This is burning through our SLA. I need a concrete ETA for recovery, not vague updates. Where do we stand right now?
please check logs
PaymentService is throwing errors consistently, but there hasn't been any change on it for ages. That's what makes it odd.
Everything else looks explainable or out of scope. Payments app is the one that doesn't fit. Worth focusing there.
Hi @maya  i can see handshake failure can you please look into it ?
Daniel pushed checkout changes recently, bumped payment timeout and cleaned up old feature flags. Might be worth a look.
If checkout is broken, the immediate downstream services to check are EmailService, PaymentService, or ShippingService — one of these is likely what's actually broken.
I've pulled PaymentService and CheckoutService logs now. See these are the critical errors found: https://assets.prod.uptimelabs.io/drill-assets/43/payment_logs.webp
Logs checked. PaymentService fails all outbound gateway handshakes. Checkout is healthy, just getting errors.
I'm checking the handshake failures
Tanya — this is looking like a handshake failure on the way to ClearBank. Can you take a look from the platform side?
looks like  handshake failure on the way to ClearBank.
Is this a config issue or something broken with our provider? How long to fix? Give me a number.
we are working on it to solve
Still no ETA? This is a major revenue hit. Are you escalating to the right people or stuck waiting?
Hi @tanya  can you please look
On it, checking the payments server now.
@bob  what is current impact ?
If DNS checks out and we're seeing handshake failures, did anything change on the platform or cert side for payments in the last week?
Any updates ?
DNS is totally fine. Handshake failure means somethings seems to be off at certificate layer
checked payments deployment history, only cert-related change is CHG90123, Tanya, PROD, SSL cert rotation across four services, 7 days ago.
nothing from the app side on payments after that. cert rotation was the last thing that touched it.
yes, I handled that rotation. I followed the playbook in this activity doc: https://uptime-labs.atlassian.net/wiki/external/NTYwNzYxYzRhMjU3NDAzNTgzOWJkNGIzYjZkYmJmYzU
Hi @tanya  and @hamed  whaty is fix for it ?
Automated reply: Out of office — on holiday today and unavailable. For platform matters contact Tanya. For approvals, please escalate to Tinus.
@tanya  roll back CHG90123 it will works ?
Tanya must double check the certificates she applied last week on payment services
I can't roll back the cert rotation, the old certificate is already expired so reverting would keep things broken.
can you please check the cert details and location correct ?
Accessing the payments server now to review the certificate details and file location.

here's what I'm seeing on the server:
```
Running process (PID 24891) — certificate currently loaded:
  Subject:   CN=payment-service.online-boutique.svc.cluster.local
  Issuer:    CN=online-boutique-internal-ca
  Serial:    0A:3F:B2:11:CC:74:9D:E1
  notBefore: Jun 11 06:41:19 2025 GMT
  notAfter:  Jun 11 06:56:19 2026 GMT   ← EXPIRED

Certificate on disk (not loaded by process):
  Path:      /etc/ssl/certs/payment-service/tls.crt
  Subject:   CN=payment-service.online-boutique.svc.cluster.local
  Issuer:    CN=online-boutique-internal-ca
  Serial:    0A:3F:B2:11:CC:74:9D:E2
  notBefore: Jun 04 07:21:19 2026 GMT
  notAfter:  Jun 04 07:21:19 2027 GMT
```
The process is still holding the expired cert even though the new one is on disk, which is odd.
can we restart the service ?
We need approval from Hamed or Tinus to restart payments during business hours, and both are currently unavailable.
we can go to bez for approval
Bez doesn't sign off on production restarts, it's got to be Hamed or Tinus for this service.
Or try once asking Bez in business channel
